chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No. 819 of 2024 (Sharifullah v. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 08.05.2024 Mr. Saeed ur Rehman, advocate for the applicant Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, Asstt. PG ----------------------------------- It is alleged that on the arrest from the applicant has been secured an unlicensed pistol of 30 bores with a magazine containing three live bullets of the same bore, which he allegedly was having at the time of committing robbery, for which the present case was registered. On having been refused bail by learned VIIIth-Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi, Malir, the applicant has sought the same from this Court by way of instant bail application under Section 497 Cr.P.C. Heard arguments and perused the record. The pistol is alleged by the applicant to have been foisted upon him by the police. The applicant has already been admitted to bail in a main case relating to robbery by this Court in earlier hours of the day. The case has finally been challaned and there is no likelihood of absconsion or tampering with the evidence on the part of the applicant, who is said to be in custody for 03 months without effective progress in the trial of his case. In these circumstances, a case for the release of the applicant on bail on point of further inquiry is made out. In view of above, the applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. Instant bail application is disposed of accordingly.

In view of above, the applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. Instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E
